name: rad-session
description: Resource-aware session briefings and disciplined wrapup for Claude Code, optimized for Opus 4.7 (Sonnet 4.6 / Haiku 4.5 compatible). /startup runs parallel-batched resource discovery (MCPs, CLIs, scripts, env, CLAUDE.md @imports) with stale-handoff auto-refresh from git log, /wrapup uses an explicit tag-and-synthesize scan to produce comparable output across models and auto-proceeds on low-risk CLAUDE.md prunes, /add-resource registers new tools via targeted edits, and a PreCompact hook enumerates six capture targets to survive thin post-compaction context.
